changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Insert record in notification_template for Invitation To Regulator
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template (id, name, subject, text) VALUES (nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InvitationToRegulatorAccount', 'Confirm your account - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'An account has been created for you in the CCA reporting service.
[Confirm your account](${regulatorInvitationConfirmationLink})
This link will expire in 72 hours.
You will be asked to create a password and set up two-factor authentication.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.');

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InviteeInvitationAccepted', 'Your account has been accepted - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'You have successfully accepted your account on the CCA reporting service.
You can now [sign in to your account](${homeUrl}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InviterInvitationAccepted', 'User account activation', 'Dear ${userFirstName} ${userLastName},
This is to notify you that ${userInviteeFirstName} ${userInviteeLastName} has accepted the invitation.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'UserAccountActivation', 'Your account has been activated - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'Your ${userRoleType} account has been activated in the CCA reporting service.
You can now [sign in to your account](${homeUrl}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE notification_template SET text = 'An account has been created for you in the CCA reporting service.
[Confirm your account](${regulatorInvitationConfirmationLink})
This link will expire in 72 hours.
You will be asked to create a password and set up two-factor authentication.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' WHERE name = 'InvitationToRegulatorAccount';

changeSet.author: konstantinos.kavvalakis@trasys.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'Change2FA', 'Two factor authentication device update request - Manage your CCA reporting', 'Use this link to sign in to the CCA service and update your authenticator app:
[Sign in and set up new two factor authentication](${change2FALink})
This link will expire in ${expirationMinutes} minutes.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: konstantinos.kavvalakis@trasys.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'Reset2FaConfirmation', 'Two-factor authentication reset - Manage your CCA reporting', 'We received your request to reset your two-factor authentication for the CCA service.
Sign in to the [CCA service](${homeUrl}) to set up a new authenticator and access your account.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );
